#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH line is verbatim-borrowed from incident-analysis MATCH fixture.

MATCH: let's do a discovery session to map out user problems before we build anything
MATCH: map out the pain points users face when onboarding to the product
MATCH: what should we build next given the backlog and roadmap priorities

NO_MATCH: investigate the production outage from last night
